revision.text: {| style="background: transparent; border: none;" |- {{ #if: {{{4|}}} | {{!}} {{ #if: {{{2|}}} | rowspan="2" {{!}} }} [[File:{{{4}}}|64px]] }} | class="dark_text_1" style="font-size: 3.3em; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; color: #4e4eff; font-weight: bold; padding: 4px 2px 2px; width: 0.5em; vertical-align: top;" | “ | ''{{{1}}}'' | class="dark_text_1" style="font-size: 3.3em; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; color: #4e4eff; font-weight: bold; padding: 4px 2px 2px; width: 0.5em; vertical-align: bottom;" | „ {{#if: {{{2|}}} | {{!}}- {{!}} <!-- empty cell --> {{!}} style="text-align: right;" {{!}} <small>~ '''{{{2}}}{{ #if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}'''</small> {{!}} <!-- empty cell to prevent potential rendering issues --> }} |}
{{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}}<noinclude> [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] </noinclude>

{{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{Quote/doc/boilerplate}} == Usage == This is a simple wrapper for {{tlx|Cquote}} that takes three parameters: * first unnamed parameter – the text to be quoted (required) * second unnamed parameter – the individual or organizational author of the quoted material (optional) * third unnamed parameter – the subject of the quotation (optional) Example: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} produces: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] }}

{{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{Quote/doc/boilerplate}} == Usage == This is a simple wrapper for {{tlx|Cquote}} that takes three parameters: * first unnamed parameter – the text to be quoted (required) * second unnamed parameter – the individual or organizational author of the quoted material (optional) * third unnamed parameter – the subject of the quotation (optional) Example: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} produces: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} This sort of presentation is intended for wikiproject pages, userspace, and other non-article contexts. Use of it in articles will be a [[{WP:UNDUE]] problem in most cases, and its centered presentation is inconsistent with the rest of our article layout. [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] }}

{{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{Quote/doc/boilerplate}} == Usage == This is a simple wrapper for {{tlx|Cquote}} that takes three parameters: * first unnamed parameter – the text to be quoted (required) * second unnamed parameter – the individual or organizational author of the quoted material (optional) * third unnamed parameter – the subject of the quotation (optional) Example: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} produces: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} This sort of presentation is intended for wikiproject pages, userspace, and other non-article contexts. Use of it in articles will be a [[WP:UNDUE]] problem in most cases, and its centered presentation is inconsistent with the rest of our article layout. [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] }}

{| style="background: transparent; border: none;" |- {{ #if: {{{4|}}} | {{!}} {{ #if: {{{2|}}} | rowspan="2" {{!}} }} [[File:{{{4}}}|64px]] }} | class="dark_text_1" style="font-size: 3.3em; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; color: #4e4eff; font-weight: bold; padding: 4px 2px 2px; width: 0.5em; vertical-align: top;" | “ | ''{{{1}}}'' | class="dark_text_1" style="font-size: 3.3em; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; color: #4e4eff; font-weight: bold; padding: 4px 2px 2px; width: 0.5em; vertical-align: bottom;" | „ {{#if: {{{2|}}} | {{!}}- {{!}} <!-- empty cell --> {{!}} style="text-align: right;" {{!}} <small>~ '''{{{2}}}{{ #if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}'''</small> {{!}} <!-- empty cell to prevent potential rendering issues --> }} |}

{{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{Quote/doc/boilerplate}} == Usage == This is a simple wrapper for {{tlx|Cquote}} that takes three parameters: * first unnamed parameter – the text to be quoted (required) * second unnamed parameter – the individual or organizational author of the quoted material (optional) * third unnamed parameter – the subject of the quotation (optional) Example: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} produces: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} This sort of presentation is intended for wikiproject pages, userspace, and other non-article contexts. Use of it in articles will be a [[WP:UNDUE]] problem in most cases, and its centered presentation is inconsistent with the rest of our article layout. [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] }}

{| style="background: transparent; border: none;" |- {{ #if: {{{4|}}} | {{!}} {{ #if: {{{2|}}} | rowspan="2" {{!}} }} [[File:{{{4}}}|64px]] }} | class="dark_text_1" style="font-size: 3.3em; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; color: #4e4eff; font-weight: bold; padding: 4px 2px 2px; width: 0.5em; vertical-align: top;" | “ | ''{{{1}}}'' | class="dark_text_1" style="font-size: 3.3em; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; color: #4e4eff; font-weight: bold; padding: 4px 2px 2px; width: 0.5em; vertical-align: bottom;" | „ {{#if: {{{2|}}} | {{!}}- {{!}} <!-- empty cell --> {{!}} style="text-align: right;" {{!}} <small>~ '''{{{2}}}{{ #if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}'''</small> {{!}} <!-- empty cell to prevent potential rendering issues --> }} |}
{{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}}<noinclude> [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] </noinclude>

{{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{Quote/doc/boilerplate}} == Usage == This is a simple wrapper for {{tlx|Cquote}} that takes three parameters: * first unnamed parameter – the text to be quoted (required) * second unnamed parameter – the individual or organizational author of the quoted material (optional) * third unnamed parameter – the subject of the quotation (optional) Example: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} produces: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] }}

Use of it in articles will be a [[{WP:UNDUE]] problem in most cases, and its centered presentation is inconsistent with the rest of our article layout. [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] }}

{| style="background: transparent; border: none;" |- {{ #if: {{{4|}}} | {{!}} {{ #if: {{{2|}}} | rowspan="2" {{!}} }} [[File:{{{4}}}|64px]] }} | class="dark_text_1" style="font-size: 3.3em; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; color: #4e4eff; font-weight: bold; padding: 4px 2px 2px; width: 0.5em; vertical-align: top;" | “ | ''{{{1}}}'' | class="dark_text_1" style="font-size: 3.3em; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; color: #4e4eff; font-weight: bold; padding: 4px 2px 2px; width: 0.5em; vertical-align: bottom;" | „ {{#if: {{{2|}}} | {{!}}- {{!}} <!-- empty cell --> {{!}} style="text-align: right;" {{!}} <small>~ '''{{{2}}}{{ #if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}'''</small> {{!}} <!-- empty cell to prevent potential rendering issues --> }} |}
{{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}}<noinclude> [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] </noinclude>

{{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{Quote/doc/boilerplate}} == Usage == This is a simple wrapper for {{tlx|Cquote}} that takes three parameters: * first unnamed parameter – the text to be quoted (required) * second unnamed parameter – the individual or organizational author of the quoted material (optional) * third unnamed parameter – the subject of the quotation (optional) Example: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} produces: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] }}

{{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{Quote/doc/boilerplate}} == Usage == This is a simple wrapper for {{tlx|Cquote}} that takes three parameters: * first unnamed parameter – the text to be quoted (required) * second unnamed parameter – the individual or organizational author of the quoted material (optional) * third unnamed parameter – the subject of the quotation (optional) Example: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} produces: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} This sort of presentation is intended for wikiproject pages, userspace, and other non-article contexts. Use of it in articles will be a [[{WP:UNDUE]] problem in most cases, and its centered presentation is inconsistent with the rest of our article layout. [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] }}

{{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{Quote/doc/boilerplate}} == Usage == This is a simple wrapper for {{tlx|Cquote}} that takes three parameters: * first unnamed parameter – the text to be quoted (required) * second unnamed parameter – the individual or organizational author of the quoted material (optional) * third unnamed parameter – the subject of the quotation (optional) Example: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} produces: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} This sort of presentation is intended for wikiproject pages, userspace, and other non-article contexts. Use of it in articles will be a [[WP:UNDUE]] problem in most cases, and its centered presentation is inconsistent with the rest of our article layout. [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] }}

{{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{Quote/doc/boilerplate}} == Usage == This is a simple wrapper for {{tlx|Cquote}} that takes three parameters: * first unnamed parameter – the text to be quoted (required) * second unnamed parameter – the individual or organizational author of the quoted material (optional) * third unnamed parameter – the subject of the quotation (optional) Example: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} produces: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} This sort of presentation is intended for wikiproject pages, userspace, and other non-article contexts. Use of it in articles will be a [[WP:UNDUE]] problem in most cases, and its centered presentation is inconsistent with the rest of our article layout. [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{Quote/doc/boilerplate}} == Usage == This is a simple wrapper for {{tlx|Cquote}} that takes three parameters: * first unnamed parameter – the text to be quoted (required) * second unnamed parameter – the individual or organizational author of the quoted material (optional) * third unnamed parameter – the subject of the quotation (optional) Example: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[:en:Albert Einstein|Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} produces: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[:en:Albert Einstein|Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} This sort of presentation is intended for wikiproject pages, userspace, and other non-article contexts. Use of it in articles will be a [[WP:UNDUE]] problem in most cases, and its centered presentation is inconsistent with the rest of our article layout. [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{Quote/doc/boilerplate}} == Usage == This is a simple wrapper for {{tlx|Cquote}} that takes three parameters: * first unnamed parameter – the text to be quoted (required) * second unnamed parameter – the individual or organizational author of the quoted material (optional) * third unnamed parameter – the subject of the quotation (optional) Example: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[:en:Albert Einstein|Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} produces: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[:en:Albert Einstein|Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} This sort of presentation is intended for wikiproject pages, userspace, and other non-article contexts. Use of it in articles will be a [[WP:UNDUE]] problem in most cases, and its centered presentation is inconsistent with the rest of our article layout. [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{Quote/doc/boilerplate}} == Usage == This is a simple wrapper for {{tlx|Cquote}} that takes three parameters: * first unnamed parameter – the text to be quoted (required) * second unnamed parameter – the individual or organizational author of the quoted material (optional) * third unnamed parameter – the subject of the quotation (optional) Example: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[:en:Albert Einstein|Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} produces: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[:en:Albert Einstein|Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} This sort of presentation is intended for wikiproject pages, userspace, and other non-article contexts. Use of it in articles will be a [[WP:UNDUE]] problem in most cases, and its centered presentation is inconsistent with the rest of our article layout. [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{Quote/doc/boilerplate}} == Usage == This is a simple wrapper for {{tlx|Cquote}} that takes three parameters: * first unnamed parameter – the text to be quoted (required) * second unnamed parameter – the individual or organizational author of the quoted material (optional) * third unnamed parameter – the subject of the quotation (optional) Example: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[:en:Albert Einstein|Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} produces: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[:en:Albert Einstein|Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} This sort of presentation is intended for wikiproject pages, userspace, and other non-article contexts. Use of it in articles will be a [[WP:UNDUE]] problem in most cases, and its centered presentation is inconsistent with the rest of our article layout. [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{Quote/doc/boilerplate}} == Usage == This is a simple wrapper for {{tlx|Cquote}} that takes three parameters: * first unnamed parameter – the text to be quoted (required) * second unnamed parameter – the individual or organizational author of the quoted material (optional) * third unnamed parameter – the subject of the quotation (optional) Example: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[:en:Albert Einstein|Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} produces: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[:en:Albert Einstein|Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} This sort of presentation is intended for wikiproject pages, userspace, and other non-article contexts. Use of it in articles will be a [[WP:UNDUE]] problem in most cases, and its centered presentation is inconsistent with the rest of our article layout. [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Cquote|text={{{1}}}|author={{{2|}}}|source={{safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} |  on {{{3}}}}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{Quote/doc/boilerplate}} == Usage == This is a simple wrapper for {{tlx|Cquote}} that takes three parameters: * first unnamed parameter – the text to be quoted (required) * second unnamed parameter – the individual or organizational author of the quoted material (optional) * third unnamed parameter – the subject of the quotation (optional) Example: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[:en:Albert Einstein|Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} produces: {{Quote2|I am by heritage a Jew, by citizenship a Swiss, and by makeup a human being, and only a human being, without any special attachment to any state or national entity whatsoever. |[[:en:Albert Einstein|Albert Einstein]] |labeling}} This sort of presentation is intended for wikiproject pages, userspace, and other non-article contexts. Use of it in articles will be a [[WP:UNDUE]] problem in most cases, and its centered presentation is inconsistent with the rest of our article layout. [[Category:Enhanced quote templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
